_doc: Raven Hollow D2-style class SELECT SCREEN pedestal data (BLUEPRINT_84, BACKLOG #84). One entry per playable class, laid out left-to-right by array order. Consumed by scripts/systems/select_screen_system.gd, which self-instances a pure-code CanvasLayer hall of pedestals. Facts (name/title/lore/sheet/variant/color) mirror scripts/class_defs.gd; ability blurbs are concrete one-line tooltips; stat_bias is the level-1 primary base from data/classes_stats.json (the UI normalizes it into bias bars). portrait = the animated szadi char sheet + variant sliced by SheetAnim.make_szadi_frames, or null to fall back to a labeled placeholder.
title: CHOOSE YOUR CHAMPION
subtitle: Raven Hollow -- Emberfall

pedestals.name: Warrior
pedestals.lore: When the Emberfall razed the old garrison, only the drill-yard's stubbornness survived in him. Now he stands where the palisade burned, daring the dark to try Raven Hollow twice.

abilities.name: Shield Charge
abilities.blurb: Charge a foe; your next blow lands at 180% force.

abilities.name: Sunder
abilities.blurb: A heavy 70-degree cleave that shatters a single target.

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.blurb: Roar for 5s: +40% move speed, +30% damage.

abilities.name: Earthshaker
abilities.blurb: Slam the ground for wide damage and a 50% slow.

pedestals.name: Rogue
pedestals.lore: Raised in the fog-alleys behind the tavern, he learned young that a quiet knife settles what loud men cannot. The Hollow's shadows owe him favors, and he collects them nightly.

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.blurb: A tight strike from the shadows for burst damage.

abilities.name: Shadowstep
abilities.blurb: Blink 70px through smoke; your next hit deals double.

abilities.name: Fan of Knives
abilities.blurb: Hurl eight blades outward in a radial burst.

abilities.name: Death Blossom
abilities.blurb: Whirl a lingering blade-storm around yourself.

pedestals.name: Mage
pedestals.lore: She copied forbidden ember-script by candlelight until the candle answered back. The town council distrusts her violet fire, yet they knock on her door whenever the dark grows teeth.

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.blurb: Lob a bursting fireball with a 30px splash.

abilities.name: Frost Nova
abilities.blurb: Freeze nearby foes, slowing them 50% for 3s.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.blurb: Teleport 90px through the arcane weave.

abilities.name: Cinderfall
abilities.blurb: Call twelve meteors down over a wide area.

pedestals.name: Paladin
pedestals.lore: Sworn at the ashen chapel on the hill, he carries the last consecrated hammer left in the Hollow. His faith is quiet, dented, and yet to break.

abilities.name: Holy Smite
abilities.blurb: Sear a foe with a bolt of dawnlight.

abilities.name: Consecration
abilities.blurb: Bless the ground; it burns the wicked for 4s.

abilities.name: Lay on Hands
abilities.blurb: Instantly restore 50 health.

abilities.name: Dawnbreak
abilities.blurb: A pillar of dawn roots and scorches a wide ring.

pedestals.name: Necromancer
pedestals.lore: Years tending Raven Hollow's graveyard taught him that the dead make loyal neighbors. He raises them politely, works them briefly, and always tucks them back in.

abilities.name: Drain Life
abilities.blurb: Siphon a foe, healing for 35% of the damage.

abilities.name: Raise Dead
abilities.blurb: Summon a skeleton to fight at your side.

abilities.name: Grave Grasp
abilities.blurb: Cold hands erupt and root foes for 1.5s.

abilities.name: Soul Harvest
abilities.blurb: Rain fourteen soul-bolts across the field.

pedestals.name: Hunter
pedestals.lore: The rooks of the Hollow choose one warden a generation, and they chose him at the gallows-tree. His arrows fly where the ravens point, and the ravens are never wrong.

abilities.name: Piercing Shot
abilities.blurb: A fast arrow that punches through armor.

abilities.name: Snare Trap
abilities.blurb: Set a trap that roots and slows for 2.5s.

abilities.name: Rook Companion
abilities.blurb: Call a raven to harry your foes.

abilities.name: Arrow Storm
abilities.blurb: Rain arrows over a marked patch of ground.

pedestals.name: Druid
pedestals.lore: When the blight crept up out of the mire, she swore herself to the old wildwood that remembers Raven Hollow older than its walls. Root and storm answer her call now -- though the forest, as it always does, will name its price.

abilities.name: Gale
abilities.blurb: A gust-orb that bursts on impact.

abilities.name: Thornroot
abilities.blurb: Roots erupt, pinning a foe for 1.6s.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.blurb: Bloom a healing-over-time on yourself.

abilities.name: Bear Form
abilities.blurb: Become a bear: +40% damage and a 35-point absorb.
